arts.ttl: Man United confirm Tyrell Malacia loan departure: How much is PSV's buy option?
arts.sum: Manchester United confirm the departure of full-back Tyrell Malacia, who joins PSV Eindhoven on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Man Utd defender Malacia joins PSV on loan
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Tyrell Malacia has joined PSV Eindhoven on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: When Will Santiago Gimenez Make His AC Milan Debut?
arts.sum: Mexico's Santiago Giménez and USMNT star Christian Pulisic could become the focal points of AC Milan's attack.

arts.ttl: Feyenoord loan Gjivai Zechiël to Sparta Rotterdam for the remainder of the season
arts.sum: Feyenoord's Gjivai Zechiël (20) will finish the season on loan at city rivals Sparta Rotterdam, the club he spent six years at as an academy player.

arts.ttl: Le Havre’s Oussama Targhalline set to join Feyenoord

arts.ttl: “I Have the Same Fiery Spirit as Milan” – Santiago Gimenez’s Passionate Journey to AC Milan
arts.sum: Santiago Gimenez, AC Milan's new star striker, has been officially presented at Casa Milan following his €35 million transfer from Feyenoord. The 23-year-old Mexican forward joins the Rossoneri as part of their impressive winter transfer campaign, which also saw the arrivals of Joao Felix, Kyle Walker, Warren Bondo, and Riccardo Sottil. The post “I Have the Same Fiery Spirit as Milan” – Santiago Gimenez’s Passionate Journey to AC Milan appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: PSV see Man City cut youngster’s loan period short for Forest move
arts.sum: Joel Ndala (18) has left his PSV loan prematurely to return to Manchester City and join Nottingham Forest on a loan-to-buy move.
